message:
fix(search_bridge): add early cancellation checks before spawning threads

Insert two guard checks at the top of the search dispatch path:
1. If the capability context is already cancelled, cancel the bridge
   and return early instead of spawning timeout/cancel threads.
2. If the bridge cancellation token is already set, propagate that
   to the capability context and return early.

This avoids unnecessary thread creation and resource allocation when
a cancellation has already been requested, reducing latency for
cancelled search operations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
